tagline: The Netskope Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Netskope Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest event and alert logs from Netskope into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Feature availability | Feature | Availability | | | | | UI based pipeline authoring | Supported | | API based pipeline authoring | Supported | | Declarative Automation Bundles | Supported | | Incremental ingestion | Supported | | Unity Catalog governance | Supported | | Orchestration using Databricks Workflows | Supported | | SCD type 2 | Not supported Netskope event and alert logs are append only.
key_takeaway: The Netskope Logs connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
